subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet sent down in truth from the presence of One Who is Mighty, Wise, wherein mention is made of that which draweth unto itself the minds of them that believe in His unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح نزل بالحق من لدن عزیز حکیم و یذکر فیه ما تنجذب عنه عقول الموحدین
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @call to action, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
